title: Jay Honnold
text: Home * People * Jay Honnold Jay Honnold [1] Jay Honnold , an American computer scientist and software development engineer (SDE1) at Amazon [2] . He is author of the UCI compliant open source chess engine Berserk , first released in February 2021 [3] .
